name: raykagi
title: RayKagi
description: Search Kagi from Raycast, plus quick access to Kagi Translate, Summarizer, News, Small Web, Assistant and bang shortcuts.
author: Shabablinchikow

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Kagi API Token
preferences.description: Optional. Needed only for the Search command (Kagi v1 Search API, billed per query, Bearer token). Generate one at kagi.com/api/keys. All other commands work without it.

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Kagi
commands.description: Autocomplete as you type (free); press Enter to run a Kagi search. Falls back to opening the browser when no API token is set.

commands.name: bang
commands.title: Create Kagi Bang Shortcut
commands.description: Pick a Kagi !bang and bind it to a Quicklink so you can give it an alias or hotkey.

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.subtitle: Kagi
commands.description: Open Kagi Translate for the given text. Configure languages/quality in preferences, or bind a Quicklink with an alias.

preferences.name: translateFrom
preferences.title: Translate From
preferences.description: Source language code (e.g. auto, en, ru, ja).

preferences.name: translateTo
preferences.title: Translate To
preferences.description: Target language code (e.g. en, ru, de, fr).

commands.name: summarize
commands.title: Summarize URL
commands.subtitle: Kagi
commands.description: Open the Kagi Universal Summarizer for a URL. Bind a Quicklink to give it an alias or hotkey.

preferences.name: summaryType
preferences.title: Summary Type
preferences.description: Prose summary or bulleted key takeaways.

preferences.name: summaryLanguage
preferences.title: Summary Language
preferences.description: Target language code (e.g. EN, RU, DE). Leave empty to keep the document's language.

commands.name: news
commands.title: Open Kagi News
commands.description: Open Kagi News in your browser.

commands.name: smallweb
commands.title: Random Small Web Page
commands.subtitle: Kagi
commands.description: Open a random page from the Kagi Small Web in your browser.

commands.name: assistant
commands.title: Open Kagi Assistant
commands.description: Open the Kagi Assistant in your browser.
